idea-plugin.name: SVN Merge Helper
idea-plugin.description:
SVN Merge Helper


A plugin for SVN merge operations


Features:

  • Quick search and browse commit history across branches
  • View changed files with diff support
  • Batch merge commits from one branch to another

SVN 分支合并增强插件


功能特性：

  • 快速搜索和浏览跨分支的提交记录
  • 查看变更文件，支持差异对比
  • 批量合并提交到目标分支
